layout.hero: centered text with overlapping photo grid

headings: Specialised AI agents. Built for insurance outcomes.
body_sections: Purpose built AI agents that automate insurance journeys, increase conversion, and prove ROI in weeks.
Enterprise ready AI agents designed to operate safely across regulated, high volume insurance workflows.
SAFER ensures every AI agent operates securely, transparently and compliantly.
From first conversation to live agent. We use a proven process refined across dozens of deployments.
testimonials: Our process is now a lot quicker — Anthony Fletcher, COO, VRG
Selma has already made a tangible difference — Robert Balls, Bikesure
OpenDialog is a leader in technological innovation — Dan Garzella

pain.biggest_frustration: Looks like every other enterprise AI/SaaS site — white background, blue accent, stock photos, centered hero with generic CTA. The three agent cards are identical templates. Nothing communicates that this is specifically built for insurance or that it's different from competitors like EIS, Ushur, or Tractable.
pain.what_works: The SAFER compliance framework is a genuine differentiator — keep that prominent. The 3 named AI agents (Selma, Jamie, Rhea) with specific metrics are strong. The 4-step process is clear. Testimonials are real and specific.
pain.dream_reaction: This company clearly understands insurance. The site feels authoritative but not corporate-stuffy — like talking to the smartest person in the room who actually makes things simple.

constraints: Keep it professional — this sells to insurance executives
Dark mode would be a bold differentiator in this space
Must feel trustworthy and regulated, not startup-y
customConstraint: No stock photos of smiling people on phones
